description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden wardrobe with a natural light wood finish and a simple, minimalist design. The front features two vertically aligned panelled doors with a metallic latch lock at the center, and a single horizontal drawer above the doors. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the wood grain without any additional ornamentation or hardware. The base has a subtle decorative cutout, adding a slight traditional touch to the otherwise modern appearance. The wardrobe stands on four short legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The overall construction suggests it is sturdy and functional, suitable for storing clothes or other personal items in an urban environment.
description: A tall, light wood wardrobe with two panelled doors, a central latch lock, and a top drawer, featuring a minimalist yet sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two panelled doors with a central metallic latch lock and a horizontal drawer above.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wood grain surface and the profile of the top drawer.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, unadorned wooden back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wood grain and drawer profile.
